notes: Canonical IDs and keys are immutable and must never be translated.
Translate only labels, aliases, and concern example inputs.
Use medically sensible, natural user-facing terminology in each target language.
Preserve slash/ampersand/parentheses structure where it improves clarity, unless a natural medical equivalent in the target language is better.
